title: physalis ciliata
intro: Physalis ciliata, also known as the hairy ground cherry or Chilean ground cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family that produces edible fruit. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Physalis ciliata include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and helping to manage blood pressure. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
